data.name: Secret Summer
data.detailed_description:
THE STORY

WARNING 18+: You were taken and separated from Norah and her three daughters to be trained as the successor to your father's lucrative business. After hearing Norah crying during one of your usual phone calls, you decide to find any way back to her and the other girls. That's when an idea pops into your head that just might make the reunion possible. But that same idea comes with its own set of problems and your secret summer visiting them may be harder than you anticipated.

Among them, there is the very serious 22-year-old sister Zoe who’s been aiming to be a top lawyer since she could talk – and argue. The complete opposite of her would be 23-year-old Leanne who is the definition of a free spirit, which Zoe abundantly disapproves of and makes clear any chance she gets. The youngest and last is 18-year-old Coral who loves video games, but has a very strong dislike for a very specific reason. And then there’s your father’s fiancé, 37-year-old high maintenance and bourgeois Irene that everyone tries to stay clear off, or you risk running her wrath. Lastly, there is 41-year-old Norah who wants to take care of everyone, even if that means neglecting herself.

THE GAME PLAY

In Secret Summer, you play as the main character and take control of all the decision-making, such as deciding to be stricter on a character or be more understanding. You have full control of how you play, and which characters you'll be spending time with. But be careful! Rejecting to spend time with a character or choosing the wrong choices may disable you from their route, and all future content with them because most choices have hidden points that you gain or lose!

***A free in-game walkthrough is also included for those who have trouble with selecting the correct choices, or for players who want to access every scene!***

FEATURES

- Name your own character

- Define the relationship within the game

- Select choices that shape the story you want

- Replay the game and choose different choices to access all content

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X 10.9
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: x86/x86_64
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
